steps.assistant_text: Byte-identical twin of func_0000EBE8; backported the EBE8 recipe verbatim: ret=p + destructive p+=4 in-place advance (2nd def blocks copyprop, p colors a0), condition-tests-expression with assignment CSE'd inside branch (v0 carrier, plain beqz + or a1,v0 delay), reverse-decl-order spill slots. Gotcha found: SUFFIX_BYTES_FORCE injection early in a file corrupts downstream section-relative HI16/LO16 addends (script shifts symbols/r_offsets but not in-place addends) — use a standalone >=2-word GLOBAL_ASM orphan block for mid-file pads instead.

metadata.verification: Promoted to build path; full make RUN_CC_CHECK=0 + cmp tenshoe.z64 baserom.z64 byte-identical; 3 trailing pad nops via standalone GLOBAL_ASM orphan block (SUFFIX injection corrupts downstream .text reloc addends this early in the file)
